5-8-96 ARBITRATION SELECTION DUE 5-23-96 5-23-96 ARBITRATION DUE TO END 8-21-96 AT 8:00AM 9=27-96 ARBITRATION AWARD 19-17-96 REQUEST FOR TRIAL DE NOVO FOR DEFT 1997 4-10-97 SETTLEMENT CONF HELD CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
4-10-97 CASE ORDERED REMANDED TP MUNI COURT 4-14-97 ORDER REMANDING TO MUNICIPAL COURT

THIS CASE WAS RECEIVED FROM SUPERIOR COURT ON 6-25-97. IT WAS FILED IN MUNICIPAL COURT ON 6-30-97. THE DELAY IN FILING IN MUNICIPAL COURT WAS DUE TO MISINFORMATION GIVEN TO MUNICIPAL COURT CLERK. TRANSFER FEES WERE WAIVED IN THIS CASE BY ORDER OF JUDGE PAUL ALVARADO. THE SUPERIOR COURT CASE NUMBER IN THIS MATTER IS 972939.
